heading: Definition
label: 7801 Definition
text: In this chapter, the term “settle” means consider, ascertain, adjust, determine, and dispose of a claim, whether by full or partial allowance or by disallowance.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4801[No source].[No source].The revised section is inserted for clarity, and is based on usage in the source laws for this revised chapter.
